prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, medium shot, steady camera. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous figure in a navy cloak with gold trim and silver hair, stands at a polished wooden table. She holds a ribboned ledger and points to a complex beast weapon blueprint, gesturing for Ari Mistfell to review the supply chain costs. Warm, vibrant anime aesthetic, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, steady camera. Ari Mistfell, an androgynous crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron and brass tool belt, leans into the frame to examine the ledger. Ari places a gloved hand on the ledger, points to a specific supply entry, then retrieves a brass tool from their belt to tap the blueprint, signaling a collaborative adjustment to the weapon's forging, no text, no watermark.
